jsonLd.title: 91Springboard is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!
